In @.polaris/clusters/POL-562/medic/run-health-consult-packet-2d9ae9d7-c6f9-496e-898d-973d20aa97da.json around lines 6 - 20, Replace the contributor-specific absolute paths in run_health_report_path, qc_artifact_refs, telemetry_path, cluster_state_path, result_path, and allowed_write_paths with repository-relative paths or the project’s established path templates. Preserve the referenced artifacts and write locations while ensuring the committed consult packet works across machines and CI.

In @.polaris/clusters/POL-562/cluster-state.json around lines 90 - 121, The cluster-state entries qc_runs[*].artifact_path and qc_repair_manifests contain machine-specific absolute paths. Replace the /Users/lsctech/Developer/Polaris prefix with repository-relative paths rooted at .polaris, preserving each artifact and repair-manifest location so path normalization works across checkouts.
